title: 《方塊前線》中文翻譯項目 · 繁體中文 [BlockFront TChinese]
description:
為《Minecraft》模組《方塊前線》提供帶自訂字型的繁體中文。
Traditional Chinese support with custom font for Minecraft mod "BlockFront".
body:
# 《方塊前線》中文翻譯專案
**B**lock**F**ront **Mod** **C**hi**n**ese **Tr**anslation **Project** 為《Minecraft》模組《方塊前線》提供中文翻譯支援
Chinese translation support for Minecraft mod "BlockFront" 如果你在使用中遇到問題，請建立 Issue
If you encounter problems during use, please create an issue

## ⭐ 專案功能 · Project Features - 添加了：
Added: - 帶自訂字型（[漢儀力量黑簡][hyliliangheij]）的簡體中文（中國大陸）翻譯。
Simplified Chinese (Chinese Mainland) translation with custom font. - 帶自訂字型（[MStiffHei HK][mstiffhei-hk]）的繁體中文（台灣 / 香港特別行政區）翻譯。
Traditional Chinese (Taiwan / Hong Kong SAR) translation with custom font. - 修正了原文中的部分拼寫、語法。
Fixed some spelling and grammar mistakes in the original text. - 格式化了遊戲內的中文。
Formatted the in-game Chinese. [hyliliangheij]: https://www.hanyi.com.cn/productdetail.php?id=589 [mstiffhei-hk]: https://www.onlinewebfonts.com/download/
## 🛠️ 使用方法 · How to Use 本專案釋出頁：
Releasing pages of this project: | | | | :- | :- | | Modrinth | [簡體中文][project-modrinth-schinese] \| [繁體中文][project-modrinth-tchinese] | | GitHub | [簡體中文 & 繁體中文][project-github] | 1. 下載資源包：
Download the resource pack: 2. 將資源包放入遊戲資源包資料夾（resourcepacks）。
Place the resource pack into the game resource pack folder (resourcepacks). 3. 在遊戲中啟用資源包，並確保資源包處於「模組資源」（Mod Resources）上方。
Enable resource pack in the game and make sure the resource pack is above "Mod Resources". [project-modrinth-schinese]: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bfmod-cntr-project-schinese [project-modrinth-tchinese]: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bfmod-cntr-project-tchinese [project-github]: https://github.com/YoMonNPC/BFMod-CNTR-Project
